cards.hook: Want to ship a game? Start here, not with an engine.
cards.caption: Want to ship a game? Start here, not with a $0 engine download. A beginner indie dev guide that skips the fluff. The gamedev stuff my feed keeps before the tutorials pile up.
cards.stance: Most "learn gamedev" advice starts with the wrong tool.

cards.hook: The indie devs building games that actually matter.
cards.caption: The indie devs building games that actually matter, not just clones. A talk on why small studios keep out-caring the big ones. Found in my feed before the timeline surfaced it.

cards.hook: Agents of Groove just teased a full soundtrack overhaul.
cards.caption: Agents of Groove just teased a full soundtrack and art overhaul. This is the indie release you want to watch before it blows up. The stuff my feed keeps before the hype hits.

cards.hook: Big AI labs chase trillion-dollar infra. Indies already ship with it.
cards.caption: Big AI labs chase trillion-dollar infra. Meanwhile indie studios use AI to punch way above their weight, today. The contrarian take my feed kept before the timeline caught up.
cards.stance: The real AI game revolution is happening in tiny studios, not frontier labs.

cards.hook: A whole game about sledding just dropped on Game Pass.
cards.caption: A whole game about sledding just dropped on Game Pass, and it looks absurdly fun. From a dev who clearly loves it. The kind of hidden release my feed keeps before you scroll past it.

cards.hook: In Fresco, the Egyptian carvings ARE the playable level.
cards.caption: In this upcoming indie game Fresco, the Egyptian wall carvings are the actual playable environment. Wild idea, gorgeous execution. Found before the timeline in my feed.
cards.stance: The best art direction this year is coming from a solo indie, not a AAA studio.

cards.hook: The part of your game that breaks with zero code changes.
cards.caption: That feeling when a feature you haven't touched in months just silently breaks. Every gamedev knows the dread. The relatable stuff my feed keeps.

cards.hook: You don't need a Hollywood budget. You need to split the tasks.
cards.caption: You don't need a Hollywood budget for game art, you need to know which tasks to hand AI and which to do by hand. A brutal-honest hybrid pipeline. The AI stuff my feed keeps.
cards.stance: AI won't replace your art team, but knowing what to hand it will replace your budget.
